about.short: Heritage of Generations & Guardian of Aghora Divinity. A professional platform for specialized astrological services by Sreekumar J Pillai.
about.long:
For me, Astrology is not merely a profession; it is a 'Sacred Flame' (Kedavilakku) bestowed upon me by my ancestors through rigorous spiritual practice (Upasana) and a timeless lineage.

Being born into a heritage profoundly versed in both Astrological Sciences and Mantric Wisdom is the cornerstone of my life's journey. Every insight I share is anchored in my unwavering devotion to Lord Ettumanoorappan and the formidable energy of the Aghora Divinity. Through decades of dedicated spiritual pursuit (Saparya) in the realm of Jyotishastra, I have moved beyond simple planetary analysis to deep life-transforming visions. I empower individuals to overcome complex life obstacles through a unique blend of traditional Mantric remedies and Shaivite spiritual practices. Just as the eternal lamp (Kedavilakku) of Ettumanoor dispels the darkness of every devotee, my mission is to illuminate a clear and righteous path for those who seek my guidance.

With over two decades of professional excellence in the media industry, I am uniquely equipped to present this ancient wisdom with absolute transparency, precision, and a modern perspective. 'Sreesooktham' is the sacred confluence where the trust of heritage, the sanctity of Shaivite divinity, and the profound strength of experience converge.
